name: Silicon Lattice
description: Crystalline computation substrate using silicon's natural sp3 tetrahedral geometry at 109.47° — the universal convergence point where multiple physical constraints meet optimal solutions. Supports 5D encoding via femtosecond laser inscription: X, Y, Z, birefringence orientation, and void size. Theoretical density of 10^15 bits/cm³ with φ-spaced shell radii r_n = r₀·φⁿ.

core_attributes.pattern: tetrahedral sp3 hybridization, 5D femtosecond inscription, φ-shell spacing
